messages.content: In-depth analysis suggest that smaller Ni particle show a great synergetic effect between metal and acid sites.

This is because smaller Ni particles have a higher surface area to volume ratio, which allows for more interaction between the metal and acid sites. The metal sites facilitate the activation and dissociation of adsorbed molecules, while the acid sites promote the protonation and stabilization of reaction intermediates. 

Additionally, smaller Ni particles tend to have a more uniform particle size distribution, which leads to a more homogeneous surface chemistry. This results in a more efficient transfer of electrons and protons between the metal and acid sites, leading to higher catalytic activity and selectivity.

Overall, the synergistic effect between metal and acid sites in smaller Ni particles enhances their catalytic performance, making them attractive candidates for various industrial applications, including hydrogenation, reforming, and oxidation reactions.
语法检查：In-depth analysis suggest that smaller Ni particle show a great synergetic effect between metal and acid sites.
In-depth analysis suggests that smaller Ni particles show a great synergetic effect between metal and acid sites.
语法检查：Further analyses reveal that the smaller Ni NPs enhanced the metal-acid synergy, leading to a higher selectivity to isomers than that of the larger counterpart.
Further analysis reveals that the smaller Ni NPs enhance the metal-acid synergy, leading to a higher selectivity to isomers than that of the larger counterpart.
语法检查：The Ni/SAPO-11 catalyst with 5.3 nm exhibits the i-C6 generation rate of 2.1E-6 molg-1s-1 and TOFn-C6 of 18.3 h-1 which is 1.2 and nearly 2-times that of the 11.7 nm ones, respectively.
The Ni/SAPO-11 catalyst with 5.3 nm exhibits an i-C6 generation rate of 2.1E-6 molg-1s-1 and TOFn-C6 of 18.3 h-1, which is 1.2 times and nearly 2 times that of the 11.7 nm ones, respectively.

语法检查：The phenomenon mentioned above attributes to the catalyst with small Ni particles results in a higher number of Ni sites for hexane hydrogenation and timely hydrogenation of alkene intermediates compared to catalysts with larger Ni particles.

The phenomenon mentioned above is attributed to the catalyst with small Ni particles, resulting in a higher number of Ni sites for hexane hydrogenation and timely hydrogenation of alkene intermediates compared to catalysts with larger Ni particles.
去掉逗号

The phenomenon mentioned above is attributed to the catalyst with small Ni particles resulting in a higher number of Ni sites for hexane hydrogenation and timely hydrogenation of alkene intermediates compared to catalysts with larger Ni particles.

有语法问题么：The phenomenon mentioned above attributes to the catalyst with small Ni particles resulting in a higher number of Ni sites for hexane hydrogenation and timely hydrogenation of alkene intermediates compared to catalysts with larger Ni particles.

该句子应为：

The phenomenon mentioned above is attributed to the catalyst with small Ni particles, resulting in a higher number of Ni sites for hexane hydrogenation and timely hydrogenation of alkene intermediates compared to catalysts with larger Ni particles.
为什么加逗号
在该句中，"attributed to"是一个被动语态的结构，后面接的是主语从句，所以需要使用逗号来隔开主句和从句。
A consistent decrease in TOF was observed with increasing Ni particle size，应该用was还是is
应该使用was，因为这个句子应该放在一段过去的叙述中，所以应该用一般过去时的动词。

语法检查：
It seems that decrease the Ni particle size may contributes to a better synergy between metal and acid sites, which can be evidenced by the latter discussion.
"It seems that decreasing the Ni particle size may contribute to a better synergy between metal and acid sites, which can be evidenced by the latter discussion."
有语法错误么
这个句子是正确的。
语法错误：To further investigate the reason of the different product distribution among the catalysts with various Ni NPs

语法错误的部分是 "among the catalysts with various Ni NPs"，因为介词的使用不正确。应该使用 "among catalysts containing various Ni NPs" 。

正确的句子为： "To further investigate the reason for the different product distribution among catalysts containing various Ni NPs".
为什么不能用with
使用 "among the catalysts with various Ni NPs" 的问题在于 "with" 在这个上下文中表示附带者或者工具，如 "a pen with a blue ink", 但不适用于描述金属颗粒催化剂的组成。在描述催化剂组成时，我们通常使用 "catalysts containing [Ni NPs]" 来表示含有一定金属颗粒的催化剂。

语法检查：
To further investigate the reason of the different product distribution among the catalysts with various size of Ni NPs

语法错误的部分是 "size of Ni NPs"，因为 "size" 和 "Ni NPs" 之间应该使用连词 "of" 连接。

正确的句子为： "To further investigate the reason for the different product distribution among the catalysts containing various sizes of Ni NPs".
语法对么：To further investigate the reason for the different product distribution among the catalysts with various size of Ni NPs

原句中的 "various size" 语法有误，应该是 "various sizes" 。所以正确的句子应该是： 

To further investigate the reason for the different product distribution among the catalysts with various sizes of Ni NPs.

语法检查：The results are shown in Fig. S1 and Table. S6. The better synergy between the metal and acid sites on the Ni/SAM-11-L4 catalyst with smaller Ni particles is confirmed by the smaller nas value compared to that of other catalysts with larger Ni particles.

该句子的错误在于缺少 "S" 来表示 Figure 和 Table，正确的应该是：

The results are shown in Fig. S1 and Table S6. The better synergy between the metal and acid sites on the Ni/SAM-11-L4 catalyst with smaller Ni particles is confirmed by the smaller nas value compared to that of other catalysts with larger Ni particles.
语法检查：It increases the acid catalyzed steps during two metal sites, thus resulting a higher DMB/MP and C/I ratios.

该句子有一些语法错误，在 "two metal sites" 之后缺少了一个介词。正确的应该是：

"It increases the acid-catalyzed steps between the two metal sites, thus resulting in higher DMB/MP and C/I ratios."
语法检查：It increases the acid catalyzed steps of the intermidiate during two metal sites, thus resulting a higher DMB/MP and C/I ratios.

该句子中的 "of the intermidiate" 语法有误，正确应该是 "between the two metal sites"，另外 "acid catalyzed steps" 短语需要加入连字符。因此，该句子应该改为：

"It increases the acid-catalyzed steps between the two metal sites, thus resulting in higher DMB/MP and C/I ratios."
语法检查：It increases the acid catalyzed steps between the two Ni sites, thus resulting a higher DMB/MP and C/I ratios.

该句子语法正确，只是建议把“Ni”替换为全称“nickel”以使语言更加正式和准确。因此，建议修改为：

It increases the acid-catalyzed steps between the two nickel sites, thus resulting in higher DMB/MP and C/I ratios.
语法检查：It increases the probability of excessive acid catalysis between two nickel sites
该句子语法正确，只是建议添加更多的上下文来帮助阅读者更好地理解这个过程的意义。另外，“excessive acid catalysis” 可能并不是最准确的描述，如果可以提供更具体的化学过程细节，则可能需要修改这个词组。
语法检查：In addition, the acid properties are similar to each other among the Ni/SAPO-11 catalysts with various metal NPs

该句子语法正确，只是建议使用 "metal particle size" 替换 "metal NPs"，因为在本文中，"particle size" 更加准确地描述了金属颗粒的变化。因此，建议修改为：

In addition, the acid properties are similar to each other among the Ni/SAPO-11 catalysts with various metal particle sizes.

语法检查：This is because small Ni particles possessed a higher amount of Ni sites and a higher proportion of low-coordinated corner/step Ni sites, which favored the intermediate’s timely hydrogen on the metal sites instead of excessive skeletal rearrangement or even cracking on acid sites.

该句子语法正确，只是建议使用 "possess" 替换 "possessed"，因为在这个上下文中，文章是在描述过去的研究结果。因此，建议修改为：

This is because small Ni particles possess a higher amount of Ni sites and a higher proportion of low-coordinated corner/step Ni sites, which favored the intermediate’s timely hydrogenation on the metal sites instead of excessive skeletal rearrangement or even cracking on the acid sites.

语法查重：As the particle size decreases from 11.7 to 5.3 nm, the low-coordinated Ni sites (corner, step sites) increase by a factor of 1.5 times, displaying an increased ability in the adsorption and activation of H2.
该句子语法正确，没有重复或者错误的地方。
语法检查：resulting in the significantly enhanced in activation abilities

该句子语法有错误。正确的文本应该是:

"resulting in significantly enhanced activation abilities" 

或者

"resulting in significantly enhanced abilities for activation"
语法检查：resulting in the significantly enhanced catalytic activities
该句子语法正确，没有明显错误。
英语降重：In order to alter the metal particle size over the catalysts, different amount of [Bmim][BF4] was added in the preparation process.
To adjust the metal particle size in the catalysts, varying amounts of [Bmim][BF4] were added during the preparation process.
翻译一下
调整催化剂中金属颗粒大小的方法是在制备过程中添加不同量的[Bmim] [BF4]。
英语降重：The obtained catalysts dried at 383 K for 2 h and then calcined in air at 823 K for 4 h.
The obtained catalysts were dried at 383 K for 2 hours, followed by calcination in air at 823 K for 4 hours.
denoted as换一下：The obtained catalysts were denoted as Ni/SAM-11-L1 (x = 1), Ni/SAM-11-L1 (x = 3) and Ni/SAM-11-L3 (x = 6).
The obtained catalysts were named Ni/SAM-11-L1 (x = 1), Ni/SAM-11-L1 (x = 3) and Ni/SAM-11-L3 (x = 6).
英语降重：X-ray diffraction (XRD) patterns of the catalysts were acquired with PANalytical B.V. Netherlands with Cu Ka radiation (k = 0.15418 nm) operated at 40 kV and 40 mA.
The catalysts' X-ray diffraction (XRD) patterns were obtained using PANalytical B.V. Netherlands with Cu Ka radiation (k = 0.15418 nm) operating at 40 kV and 40 mA.

英语降重：Pulse CO chemisorption experiment was performed on a quartz U-tube reactor in order to determine the metal dispersion. Prior to measurement, 0.1g of the reduced catalyst was degassed in He flow at 300 °C for 0.5 hours and cooled to 133 K.

To determine the metal dispersion, a pulse CO chemisorption experiment was carried out using a quartz U-tube reactor. Before measurement, 0.1 g of the reduced catalyst was degassed in helium flow at 300 °C for 0.5 hours and cooled to 133 K.
英语降重：A thermal conductivity detector (TCD) was utilized to monitor the effluent gas component.
A thermal conductivity detector (TCD) was used to monitor the components of the effluent gas.
开头不用a
很抱歉，开头我犯了一个错误。您提出了正确的修改，应该是 "The effluent gas components were monitored using a thermal conductivity detector (TCD)."
英文降重：The crystal phases of the catalysts were examined by XRD, and the results are shown in Fig. 1.
The crystal phases of the catalysts were analyzed using XRD, and the results are presented in Figure 1.

英文降重：The intensity of the characteristic diffraction peak of the catalysts prepared by the impregnation method is obviously lower than that of SAPO-11, which is attributed to the destruction of the phase structure of SAPO-11 by the solvent

The characteristic diffraction peak intensity of the impregnation method-prepared catalysts was significantly lower than that of SAPO-11. This can be attributed to the solvent-induced destruction of the SAPO-11 phase structure.
不用-

The intensity of the characteristic diffraction peak of the catalysts prepared by the impregnation method is noticeably lower than that of SAPO-11. This is because the solvent has destroyed the phase structure of SAPO-11.
英文降重：As shown in Fig 3
As shown in Figure 3,
语法检查：Fig 3 shows that the Ni/SAPO-11 catalysts displayed a broad H2 consumption peak in the range of 560-900 K

语法是正确的，但是在这种情况下，最好使用完整的词匣代替常用的缩写，例如 "Figure 3" 代替 "Fig 3"。因此，建议修改为：

"Figure 3 shows that the Ni/SAPO-11 catalysts displayed a broad H2 consumption peak in the range of 560-900 K."
英语降重：The reducibility of the metal species over the SAPO-11 support was analyzed by H2-TPR measurements.
The metal species' reducibility on the SAPO-11 support was analyzed using H2-TPR measurements.
语法检查：The reducibility of the metal species over the SAPO-11 support was analyzed by H2-TPR measurements.
这个句子的语法是正确的，没有错误。
英文降重：The bands at 2080 cm-1 and 2088 cm-1 are attributed to the linearly adsorbed CO on the step and corner Ni sites with low coordination number
The 2080 cm-1 and 2088 cm-1 bands are attributed to the linearly adsorbed CO on the low-coordinated step and corner Ni sites.
替换一下：can be attributed to
The 2080 cm-1 and 2088 cm-1 bands arise from the linear adsorption of CO on the sites with low coordination numbers, located at the step and corner of the Ni sites.
英文降重：the hydrogen atom was weakly absorbed on the high-coordinated terrace Ni sites
The hydrogen atom was weakly absorbed onto the high-coordinated Ni sites on the terrace.
地道一些
The hydrogen atom exhibited weak adsorption onto the highly coordinated Ni sites located on the terrace.
英文降重：Taking SAPO-11 as an example to illustrate the fitting process and the results shown in Fig. 8b, Peak I, Peak II and Peak III represent weak, medium, and strong acid sites, respectively
Using SAPO-11 as an example to illustrate the fitting process and based on the results shown in Figure 8b, it can be seen that Peak I, Peak II,
